headline: As Berkshire Buys Delta Airlines, This Billionaire Just Sold Off AAL and UAL Stocks
summary: Two billionaire investors are making opposite airline bets. While Berkshire is buying Delta, let’s take a closer look at why Appaloosa dumped American and United Airlines stocks.

headline: Assessing American Express (NYSE:AXP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: American Express stock snapshot after recent performance American Express (AXP) stock has pulled back recently, with the price down about 6% over the past month and about 10% over the past 3 months, even as its 1 year total return remains positive. See our latest analysis for American Express. The recent pullback fits into a mixed picture, with the share price down 16.35% year to date while the 1 year total shareholder return is 10.46% and the 5 year total shareholder return reaches 106.88%...
